attacking_style: Does not exhibit proactive attacking behavior; relies on defensive positioning and time gained from earlier opportunities rather than initiating late-race or climb-specific accelerations.
team_tactics: Team appears divided in priorities between supporting Eiking's GC defense and pivoting resources toward Meintjes' top-10 ambitions, suggesting limited full team commitment to his leadership.
terrain_preference: Vulnerable on sustained Category 1 climbs and technical wet descents; lacks the explosiveness for summit finishes and the technical skill for high-speed descent racing.
vulnerability: Cracks under sustained climbing pressure from GC rivals; passive race management leads to incremental time losses even without direct attacks; crashes on technical descents in wet conditions.
key_patterns: Passive defense strategy: concedes time without being attacked, suggesting limited ability to respond to pressure.
Fragility on Category 1 climbs: crashes and loses significant time when multiple hard climbs accumulate.
Team commitment uncertain: commentary suggests resources may shift to other riders mid-race.
form_trajectory: negative: progressive deterioration visible through passive time losses and catastrophic crash, indicating inability to sustain early GC position
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
